quests.title: Your First Calling
quests.description: You have reached Level 5. Your potential has crystallized into something the factions recognize. Seek your faction's Class Trainer and choose your base class specialization.

objectives.description: Open the class selection screen and choose your base class.

quests.title: The Next Threshold
quests.description: Level 20 — the Advanced class threshold. Return to your faction's Class Trainer. Prove yourself in combat to unlock your Advanced specialization branch.

objectives.description: Return to your faction's Class Trainer to begin the Advanced trial.

quests.title: The Ascension
quests.description: Level 40 — the Ascension. The Master class tier is now within reach. Seek your faction's trainer and complete the Ascension trial to claim your Master designation.

objectives.description: Seek your faction's Class Trainer for the Ascension trial.

quests.title: First Assignment
quests.description: Your first assignment with The Concordium. Clear out threats near the starter zone and collect a supply token.

objectives.description: Collect a supply token as proof of completion.

quests.title: Patrol the Perimeter
quests.description: Survey AETHEL GARDENS and neutralize roaming threats. Report your observations.

objectives.description: Survey the full extent of AETHEL GARDENS.
File a patrol log with observations.

quests.title: Hostile Escalation
quests.description: A fresh wave of threats has been identified. Eliminate them and recover faction property.

objectives.description: Recover a stolen faction emblem shard.

quests.title: Supply Disruption
quests.description: Hostile creatures are interfering with The Concordium's supply lines. Eliminate them and gather needed materials.

objectives.description: Return with the materials to your contact.

quests.title: A Warrior's Identity
quests.description: You have proven yourself to The Concordium. Class Trainer Instructor Kael is waiting for you at NEXUS CORE. Choose your combat specialization — this moment defines your legacy.

objectives.description: Speak with Instructor Kael at NEXUS CORE.
Open the class selection screen and choose your base class.
Defeat 3 Desert Scarab to prove your chosen combat style.

quests.title: Breach the Mid-Zone
quests.description: The mid-zone around BROKEN CIVIL QUARTER requires a foothold. Clear the initial hostiles.

objectives.description: Enter BROKEN CIVIL QUARTER for the first time.

quests.title: Elimination Priority
quests.description: Targeted elimination order in BROKEN CIVIL QUARTER. Specific hostile variants must be neutralized.

quests.title: Resource Cache
quests.description: Recover equipment salvage from the hostile-controlled mid-zone.

quests.title: The Named Threat
quests.description: A named hostile has been identified in BROKEN CIVIL QUARTER. Eliminate it and retrieve proof.

objectives.description: Defeat the Slime King — a named threat in this region.
Collect proof of the named threat's defeat.

quests.title: Securing the Zone
quests.description: The mid-zone must be formally secured under The Concordium's authority. Eliminate resistance and establish presence.

objectives.description: Report zone status to Officer Valen.

quests.title: Into High Territory
quests.description: Push into CRADLE OUTER RING — the high-tier operational zone. Establish presence.

quests.title: Intelligence Sweep
quests.description: Conduct a sweep of CRADLE OUTER RING and gather tactical intelligence.

objectives.description: Gather 3 intelligence fragments from the field.

quests.title: Counter-Operations
quests.description: Rival forces are contesting The Concordium's claims. Execute counter-operations and push them back.

quests.title: Extraction Protocol
quests.description: A critical package is in hostile hands deep in CRADLE OUTER RING. Recover it.

objectives.description: Locate and secure the extraction package.

quests.title: Elite Takedown
quests.description: An elite-tier named entity has been reported. The Concordium requires its immediate elimination.

quests.title: Strategic Control
quests.description: Seize strategic control points in the high zone. This is a priority operation.

quests.title: Infiltration
quests.description: Infiltrate the hostile stronghold in CRADLE OUTER RING and extract classified data.

objectives.description: Recover classified data from the hostile stronghold.

quests.title: Open Conflict
quests.description: All-out engagement authorized. The Concordium pushes hard in the high zone.

quests.title: Clearance Operation
quests.description: Final clearance before the Level 20 threshold. No hostile should remain active in CRADLE OUTER RING.

objectives.description: Collect 3 clearance tokens from defeated hostiles.

quests.title: The Advance — The Concordium's Trial
quests.description: Level 20. Instructor Kael is calling. Complete the Advanced class trial: defeat 5 elite-rank hostiles and the Resonance Echo — then return to claim your Advanced class designation.

objectives.description: Defeat the Resonance Echo — the Advanced trial capstone.
Return to Instructor Kael and claim your Advanced class designation.

quests.title: The Second Frontier
quests.description: Push into INNER CRADLE EXCLUSION — the second operational high-zone.

quests.title: Threat Multiplied
quests.description: The threats in INNER CRADLE EXCLUSION are multiplying. Run an elimination sweep.

quests.title: Hostile Command
quests.description: Locate and destroy the hostile command presence in the region.

quests.title: Asset Denial
quests.description: Deny a contested asset to rival factions operating in the zone.

quests.title: The Warden
quests.description: A named entity has reappeared at elevated strength. Take it down.

objectives.description: Defeat the Resonance Echo again — it has reappeared at greater strength.

quests.title: Deep Incursion
quests.description: Conduct a deep incursion into the most hostile section of the zone.

quests.title: The Courier Run
quests.description: A priority package must be moved through heavily contested territory.

quests.title: Siege Protocol
quests.description: Execute the siege protocol — establish The Concordium's dominance across the zone.

objectives.description: Place 3 siege markers at key positions.

quests.title: Final Sweep
quests.description: Complete the final sweep of INNER CRADLE EXCLUSION before the Ascension event.

quests.title: The Ascension — Master of The Concordium
quests.description: Level 30 — halfway to mastery. The path ahead demands more. Complete the mid-tier Ascension trial and prove you are worthy of the deep endgame zones.

objectives.description: Defeat the Resonance Echo once more.
Report to Instructor Kael for the Ascension acknowledgement.

quests.title: Endgame Threshold
quests.description: The endgame zone ORBITAL SENTINEL COMMAND is now within reach. Establish a presence.

objectives.description: Enter ORBITAL SENTINEL COMMAND for the first time.

quests.title: Void-Born Threats
quests.description: Entities from the void have flooded the endgame zone. Begin systematic elimination.

quests.title: Relic Recovery
quests.description: Ancient relics of enormous value lie in ORBITAL SENTINEL COMMAND. Retrieve them through the hostile presence.

objectives.description: Recover 3 ancient relics from the region.

quests.title: Faction War
quests.description: Open faction conflict has erupted in the endgame zone. Fight for The Concordium's claims.

quests.title: The Deep Hunt
quests.description: A raid-tier threat has been located. This is the first true boss-class engagement of the endgame.

objectives.description: Hunt and defeat the Ashen Drake.

quests.title: Strategic Seizure
quests.description: Seize strategic infrastructure in the endgame zone to establish The Concordium's permanent foothold.

quests.title: Corrupted Depths
quests.description: Strange corruption events are intensifying. Investigate the source and bring samples.

quests.title: The Reaping
quests.description: Mass-elimination sweep of the endgame zone's most dangerous hostiles.

quests.title: Before the Storm
quests.description: The calm before the ultimate storm. Gather final intelligence in ORBITAL SENTINEL COMMAND.

objectives.description: Gather pre-storm data from the field.

quests.title: The Master Ascension
quests.description: Level 40 — the true Ascension. Instructor Kael demands the final trial: defeat the Ashen Drake and two elite endgame entities, then claim your Master class.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake — the Ascension capstone.
Return to Instructor Kael and claim your Master class designation.

quests.title: The Abyss Calls
quests.description: The Void Echo Chasm awaits. Venture in and establish the first foothold.

quests.title: Void Infestation
quests.description: Void entities have overrun access corridors. Clear them aggressively.

quests.title: Relic of the Void
quests.description: Ancient void relics are scattered through the chasm. Retrieve them.

objectives.description: Recover 3 void relics from the chasm depths.

quests.title: Warfront
quests.description: An all-faction warfront has erupted at the Void Echo Chasm. Fight for The Concordium's position.

quests.title: Herald of the Abyss
quests.description: The Ashen Drake — the Shattered Heart's apex predator — has been engaged. End it.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake in the Shattered Heart.

quests.title: Fracture Line
quests.description: A massive fracture event is destabilizing the Aethel Storm Belt. Investigate.

quests.title: The Harbinger Stirs
quests.description: Signs of the Abyss Harbinger awakening have been detected. Trace its movements.

objectives.description: Collect traces of the Harbinger's presence.

quests.title: Endgame Sweep
quests.description: Systematic sweep of Shattered Heart — eliminate everything that moves.

objectives.description: Defeat 15 Drake Minions in the Shattered Heart.

quests.title: Before the Final Threshold
quests.description: One final mission before the ultimate confrontation. Secure the threshold key.

quests.title: The Ashen Drake's Domain
quests.description: Level 50. The Ashen Drake awaits in the Shattered Heart. This is a The Concordium Tier-1 boss engagement — full power, no reinforcements. Prove your mastery.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake — Tier-1 raid boss.
Collect 3 Drake Scales as proof of the kill.

quests.title: Beyond the Drake
quests.description: The Drake is down, but the void grows stronger. Push deeper.

quests.title: Soul Fracture
quests.description: The Soul Fragmenter has emerged from the void depths. Eliminate it.

quests.title: Chrono Disruption
quests.description: A Chrono Wraith is unraveling the Void Echo Chasm's spatial structure.

quests.title: Void Dominance
quests.description: Establish The Concordium's total dominance over the Void Echo Chasm.

quests.title: Shattered Supremacy
quests.description: The Shattered Heart's Gigantic Jotunn must be toppled. Hunt it down.

quests.title: Orbital Horizon
quests.description: The Orbital Sentinel Command is now within reach. Establish a foothold.

quests.title: Sentinel Protocol
quests.description: Override the Sentinel Protocol and seize control of orbital assets.

objectives.description: Capture 2 Sentinel Cores from hostile units.

quests.title: Harbinger's Trail
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger's trail grows unmistakable. Follow it.

objectives.description: Collect Harbinger shards — traces of its passing.

quests.title: Final Preparations
quests.description: All-out engagement before the final confrontation. Leave nothing standing.

quests.title: The Abyss Harbinger
quests.description: Level 60. The Abyss Harbinger has fully awakened. The Concordium dispatches its supreme operative. Defeat it in the Void Echo Chasm and shatter the void's hold.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — Tier-2 raid boss.

quests.title: Beyond the Void
quests.description: The Severance Faultline is the next frontier. What lies beyond the void?

quests.title: Faultline Fractures
quests.description: The Severance Faultline is fracturing. Investigate and contain where possible.

quests.title: Prima Horizon
quests.description: The Prima Materia Forge holds the purest materials in existence. Secure access.

quests.title: Forge Conflict
quests.description: Rival forces are contesting the Prima Materia Forge. Drive them out.

quests.title: Aethel Core Rift
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is collapsing. Stabilize it or the consequences will be catastrophic.

objectives.description: Deploy 2 rift stabilizers in the Aethel Siphon Core.

quests.title: Titan's Wake
quests.description: The Gravity Titan has reawakened. This is a raid-tier emergency.

objectives.description: Defeat the Gravity Titan — Tier-3 raid entity.

quests.title: Orbital Sovereignty
quests.description: Claim orbital sovereignty for The Concordium. This is an endgame-defining operation.

quests.title: Void Emperor
quests.description: The void entities are coalescing around a new apex entity. Shatter its formation.

quests.title: The World's Edge
quests.description: You stand at the world's edge. What comes next defines everything.

objectives.description: Collect data from the world's edge — the Severance Faultline's deepest point.

quests.title: The Gravity Titan Rises
quests.description: Level 70. The Gravity Titan — the most powerful non-Harbinger entity — has risen at full strength in the Cradle Expanse. This is a The Concordium maximum-priority engagement.

objectives.description: Enter the Cradle Expanse endgame zone.
Defeat the Gravity Titan — Tier-3 raid boss.

quests.title: The Forge's Depths
quests.description: The Prima Materia Forge's deepest chambers contain the rarest materials. Claim them.

quests.title: Second Harbinger
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger has returned at elevated power. End it again.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — second encounter, elevated power.

quests.title: Siphon Collapse
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is in terminal collapse. Gather what data you can before it falls.

objectives.description: Gather final Siphon Core data before collapse.

quests.title: Orbital Siege
quests.description: All-out orbital siege. The Concordium claims the Orbital Sentinel Command in its entirety.

objectives.description: Seize 3 orbital assets from rival forces.

quests.title: The Final Hunt
quests.description: The Shattered Heart must be fully cleansed. Hunt everything.

objectives.description: Defeat the Gigantic Jotunn at maximum power.

quests.title: World Fracture
quests.description: A world fracture event has been confirmed at the Severance Faultline. Witness and document it.

quests.title: Void Singularity
quests.description: A void singularity is forming. Shatter it before it becomes irreversible.

quests.title: Prime Materia Dominance
quests.description: Claim complete dominance of the Prima Materia Forge. All materials are yours.

objectives.description: Collect 8 units of Prima Materia — the ultimate crafting resource.

quests.title: Before Legend
quests.description: One mission separates you from legend. Make it count.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake one final time.

quests.title: Legend of The Concordium
quests.description: Level 80. The pinnacle. Defeat both the Gravity Titan AND the Abyss Harbinger in a single operation — the ultimate proof of The Concordium supremacy.

objectives.description: Defeat the Gravity Titan — again, at maximum power.
Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — again, at maximum power.
Claim the Legend Seal — The Concordium's highest honor.
Return to Officer Valen and be recognized as a Legend of The Concordium.

quests.title: Echoes of the Void
quests.description: The void sends echoes — endless lesser threats from its defeated masters. Silence them.

quests.title: Prima Mastery
quests.description: True mastery of the Prima Materia Forge. Collect the rarest materials in existence.

objectives.description: Collect 10 units of Prima Materia — true mastery of the Forge.

quests.title: Siphon's Ghost
quests.description: The collapsed Siphon Core still emanates power. Investigate and recover its remnants.

objectives.description: Recover remnants from the collapsed Aethel Siphon Core.

quests.title: The Orbital War
quests.description: The Orbital War for total dominance. The Concordium does not share the sky.

objectives.description: Claim 3 orbital war trophies from defeated enemies.

quests.title: Titan's Return
quests.description: The Gravity Titan returns. Eliminate it again.

objectives.description: Defeat the Gravity Titan — third encounter.

quests.title: Harbinger Eternal
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger — third manifestation. Destroy it permanently.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — third encounter, maximum difficulty.

quests.title: Void Convergence
quests.description: All void forces converge. The Concordium must be at the center of the response.

quests.title: Shattered Legacy
quests.description: The Ashen Drake — final encounter. Claim the Legacy Shard and write history.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake — third and final encounter.
Recover the Legacy Shard from the Drake's remains.

quests.title: The Last Convergence
quests.description: Everything converges at the Severance Faultline. This is the final frontier.

objectives.description: Recover the Convergence Core from the Severance Faultline.

quests.title: Apex Eternal
quests.description: Both titans of the void — simultaneously. This is what eternal legend looks like.

objectives.description: Collect the Apex Proof — both boss cores recovered simultaneously.

quests.title: Prima Materia Sovereign
quests.description: Achieve sovereign control of the Prima Materia Forge.

objectives.description: Collect 12 units of Prima Materia — forge sovereignty.

quests.title: Orbital Colossus
quests.description: Orbital colossus units threaten The Concordium's dominance. Dismantle them.

objectives.description: Destroy 2 orbital colossus units and recover their cores.

quests.title: Eternal Void
quests.description: The void is eternal — and so is the hunt. Clear it again.

quests.title: The World Engine
quests.description: The World Engine at the Aethel Siphon Core holds the final answer to Xylos's fate.

objectives.description: Uncover the World Engine's final secrets.

quests.title: Drake's Last Stand
quests.description: The Ashen Drake makes its last stand. Claim the Eternal Scale and end this forever.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake — true final encounter.
Recover the Eternal Scale — proof of eternal mastery.

quests.title: Void Absolute
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger at its absolute final form. Destroy it completely.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — absolute final form.

quests.title: The Fracture's Heart
quests.description: Journey to the Fracture's Heart — the deepest point of the Severance Faultline and of known Xylos.

objectives.description: Recover the Fracture's Heart from the Severance Faultline's deepest point.

quests.title: Prima Ultima
quests.description: Prima Ultima — beyond even Prima Materia. The rarest substance known to exist.

objectives.description: Collect 5 units of Prima Ultima — the rarest substance in existence.

quests.title: One Step From Eternity
quests.description: Three apex entities. One operation. The final step before eternity.

quests.title: Eternity — Legend of The Concordium
quests.description: Level 100. The final quest. The Gravity Titan and the Abyss Harbinger at their true eternal forms. Defeat both, recover the Eternal Crown, and return to Officer Valen. This is your legacy.

objectives.description: Enter the Void Echo Chasm at maximum depth.
Defeat the Gravity Titan — eternal form.
Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — eternal form.
Recover the Eternal Crown — The Concordium's supreme relic.
Return to Officer Valen. Be recognized as the Eternal Legend of The Concordium.

quests.title: First Assignment
quests.description: Your first assignment with The Arcanum Seekers. Clear out threats near the starter zone and collect a supply token.

objectives.description: Collect a supply token as proof of completion.

quests.title: Patrol the Perimeter
quests.description: Survey CRYSTAL SLOPE and neutralize roaming threats. Report your observations.

objectives.description: Survey the full extent of CRYSTAL SLOPE.
File a patrol log with observations.

objectives.description: Recover a stolen faction emblem shard.

objectives.description: Return with the materials to your contact.

quests.title: A Warrior's Identity
quests.description: You have proven yourself to The Arcanum Seekers. Class Trainer Archsage Myr is waiting for you at OBSERVATORY SPIRE. Choose your combat specialization — this moment defines your legacy.

objectives.description: Speak with Archsage Myr at OBSERVATORY SPIRE.
Open the class selection screen and choose your base class.
Defeat 3 Arcane Shardling to prove your chosen combat style.

quests.title: Breach the Mid-Zone

objectives.description: Defeat the Glass Ravager — a named threat in this region.
Collect proof of the named threat's defeat.

quests.description: The mid-zone must be formally secured under The Arcanum Seekers's authority. Eliminate resistance and establish presence.

objectives.description: Report zone status to Scholar Elara.

Return to Archsage Myr and claim your Advanced class designation.

quests.title: Strategic Control

objectives.description: Collect 3 clearance tokens from defeated hostiles.

objectives.description: Defeat the Black Dock Enforcer — the Advanced trial capstone.
Return to Captain Vex and claim your Advanced class designation.

quests.title: The Second Frontier
quests.description: Push into SUNKEN AETHEL RUIN — the second operational high-zone.

quests.title: Threat Multiplied
quests.description: The threats in SUNKEN AETHEL RUIN are multiplying. Run an elimination sweep.

quests.title: Hostile Command
quests.description: Locate and destroy the hostile command presence in the region.

quests.title: Asset Denial
quests.description: Deny a contested asset to rival factions operating in the zone.

quests.title: The Warden
quests.description: A named entity has reappeared at elevated strength. Take it down.

objectives.description: Defeat the Black Dock Enforcer again — it has reappeared at greater strength.

quests.title: Deep Incursion
quests.description: Conduct a deep incursion into the most hostile section of the zone.

quests.title: The Courier Run
quests.description: A priority package must be moved through heavily contested territory.

quests.title: Siege Protocol
quests.description: Execute the siege protocol — establish The Meridian Cartel's dominance across the zone.

objectives.description: Place 3 siege markers at key positions.

quests.title: Final Sweep
quests.description: Complete the final sweep of SUNKEN AETHEL RUIN before the Ascension event.

quests.title: The Ascension — Master of The Meridian Cartel

objectives.description: Defeat the Black Dock Enforcer once more.

objectives.description: Enter HIDDEN AETHELGARDIAN CITY for the first time.

quests.description: Entities from the void have flooded the endgame zone. Begin systematic elimination.

objectives.description: Recover 3 ancient relics from the region.

objectives.description: Hunt and defeat the Crystal Tyrant.

quests.title: Corrupted Depths

quests.title: The Reaping
quests.description: Mass-elimination sweep of the endgame zone's most dangerous hostiles.

quests.title: Before the Storm

quests.title: Harbinger's Trail

quests.title: Final Preparations
quests.description: All-out engagement before the final confrontation. Leave nothing standing.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — Tier-2 raid boss.

quests.title: Faultline Fractures

Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — again, at maximum power.

quests.title: Eternity — Legend of The Meridian Cartel

Defeat the Gravity Titan — eternal form.

Recover the Eternal Crown — The Meridian Cartel's supreme relic.
Return to Don Vercelli. Be recognized as the Eternal Legend of The Meridian Cartel.

quests.title: Final Sweep
quests.description: Complete the final sweep of FORGE CANYON DEPTHS before the Ascension event.

quests.title: The Ascension — Master of The Starforged Legion
quests.description: Level 30 — halfway to mastery. The path ahead demands more. Complete the mid-tier Ascension trial and prove you are worthy of the deep endgame zones.

objectives.description: Defeat the Warpath Champion once more.
Report to Centurion Valka for the Ascension acknowledgement.

quests.title: Endgame Threshold
quests.description: The endgame zone SHATTERED HEART is now within reach. Establish a presence.

objectives.description: Enter SHATTERED HEART for the first time.

quests.title: Void-Born Threats
quests.description: Entities from the void have flooded the endgame zone. Begin systematic elimination.

quests.title: Relic Recovery
quests.description: Ancient relics of enormous value lie in SHATTERED HEART. Retrieve them through the hostile presence.

objectives.description: Recover 3 ancient relics from the region.

quests.title: Faction War
quests.description: Open faction conflict has erupted in the endgame zone. Fight for The Starforged Legion's claims.

quests.title: The Deep Hunt
quests.description: A raid-tier threat has been located. This is the first true boss-class engagement of the endgame.

objectives.description: Hunt and defeat the Ashen Drake.

quests.title: Strategic Seizure
quests.description: Seize strategic infrastructure in the endgame zone to establish The Starforged Legion's permanent foothold.

quests.title: Corrupted Depths
quests.description: Strange corruption events are intensifying. Investigate the source and bring samples.

quests.title: The Reaping
quests.description: Mass-elimination sweep of the endgame zone's most dangerous hostiles.

quests.title: Before the Storm
quests.description: The calm before the ultimate storm. Gather final intelligence in SHATTERED HEART.

objectives.description: Gather pre-storm data from the field.

quests.title: The Master Ascension
quests.description: Level 40 — the true Ascension. Centurion Valka demands the final trial: defeat the Ashen Drake and two elite endgame entities, then claim your Master class.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake — the Ascension capstone.
Return to Centurion Valka and claim your Master class designation.

quests.title: The Abyss Calls
quests.description: The Void Echo Chasm awaits. Venture in and establish the first foothold.

quests.title: Void Infestation
quests.description: Void entities have overrun access corridors. Clear them aggressively.

quests.title: Relic of the Void
quests.description: Ancient void relics are scattered through the chasm. Retrieve them.

objectives.description: Recover 3 void relics from the chasm depths.

quests.title: Warfront
quests.description: An all-faction warfront has erupted at the Void Echo Chasm. Fight for The Starforged Legion's position.

quests.title: Herald of the Abyss
quests.description: The Ashen Drake — the Shattered Heart's apex predator — has been engaged. End it.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake in the Shattered Heart.

quests.title: Fracture Line
quests.description: A massive fracture event is destabilizing the Aethel Storm Belt. Investigate.

quests.title: The Harbinger Stirs
quests.description: Signs of the Abyss Harbinger awakening have been detected. Trace its movements.

objectives.description: Collect traces of the Harbinger's presence.

quests.title: Endgame Sweep
quests.description: Systematic sweep of Shattered Heart — eliminate everything that moves.

objectives.description: Defeat 15 Drake Minions in the Shattered Heart.

quests.title: Before the Final Threshold
quests.description: One final mission before the ultimate confrontation. Secure the threshold key.

quests.title: The Ashen Drake's Domain
quests.description: Level 50. The Ashen Drake awaits in the Shattered Heart. This is a The Starforged Legion Tier-1 boss engagement — full power, no reinforcements. Prove your mastery.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake — Tier-1 raid boss.
Collect 3 Drake Scales as proof of the kill.

quests.title: Beyond the Drake
quests.description: The Drake is down, but the void grows stronger. Push deeper.

quests.title: Soul Fracture
quests.description: The Soul Fragmenter has emerged from the void depths. Eliminate it.

quests.title: Chrono Disruption
quests.description: A Chrono Wraith is unraveling the Void Echo Chasm's spatial structure.

quests.title: Void Dominance
quests.description: Establish The Starforged Legion's total dominance over the Void Echo Chasm.

quests.title: Shattered Supremacy
quests.description: The Shattered Heart's Gigantic Jotunn must be toppled. Hunt it down.

quests.title: Orbital Horizon
quests.description: The Orbital Sentinel Command is now within reach. Establish a foothold.

quests.title: Sentinel Protocol
quests.description: Override the Sentinel Protocol and seize control of orbital assets.

objectives.description: Capture 2 Sentinel Cores from hostile units.

quests.title: Harbinger's Trail
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger's trail grows unmistakable. Follow it.

objectives.description: Collect Harbinger shards — traces of its passing.

quests.title: Final Preparations
quests.description: All-out engagement before the final confrontation. Leave nothing standing.

quests.title: The Abyss Harbinger
quests.description: Level 60. The Abyss Harbinger has fully awakened. The Starforged Legion dispatches its supreme operative. Defeat it in the Void Echo Chasm and shatter the void's hold.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — Tier-2 raid boss.

quests.title: Beyond the Void
quests.description: The Severance Faultline is the next frontier. What lies beyond the void?

quests.title: Faultline Fractures
quests.description: The Severance Faultline is fracturing. Investigate and contain where possible.

quests.title: Prima Horizon
quests.description: The Prima Materia Forge holds the purest materials in existence. Secure access.

quests.title: Forge Conflict
quests.description: Rival forces are contesting the Prima Materia Forge. Drive them out.

quests.title: Aethel Core Rift
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is collapsing. Stabilize it or the consequences will be catastrophic.

objectives.description: Deploy 2 rift stabilizers in the Aethel Siphon Core.

quests.title: Titan's Wake
quests.description: The Gravity Titan has reawakened. This is a raid-tier emergency.

objectives.description: Defeat the Gravity Titan — Tier-3 raid entity.

quests.title: Orbital Sovereignty
quests.description: Claim orbital sovereignty for The Starforged Legion. This is an endgame-defining operation.

quests.title: Void Emperor
quests.description: The void entities are coalescing around a new apex entity. Shatter its formation.

quests.title: The World's Edge
quests.description: You stand at the world's edge. What comes next defines everything.

objectives.description: Collect data from the world's edge — the Severance Faultline's deepest point.

quests.title: The Gravity Titan Rises
quests.description: Level 70. The Gravity Titan — the most powerful non-Harbinger entity — has risen at full strength in the Cradle Expanse. This is a The Starforged Legion maximum-priority engagement.

objectives.description: Enter the Cradle Expanse endgame zone.
Defeat the Gravity Titan — Tier-3 raid boss.

quests.title: The Forge's Depths
quests.description: The Prima Materia Forge's deepest chambers contain the rarest materials. Claim them.

quests.title: Second Harbinger
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger has returned at elevated power. End it again.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — second encounter, elevated power.

quests.title: Siphon Collapse
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is in terminal collapse. Gather what data you can before it falls.

objectives.description: Gather final Siphon Core data before collapse.

quests.title: Orbital Siege
quests.description: All-out orbital siege. The Starforged Legion claims the Orbital Sentinel Command in its entirety.

objectives.description: Seize 3 orbital assets from rival forces.

quests.title: The Final Hunt
quests.description: The Shattered Heart must be fully cleansed. Hunt everything.

objectives.description: Defeat the Gigantic Jotunn at maximum power.

quests.title: World Fracture
quests.description: A world fracture event has been confirmed at the Severance Faultline. Witness and document it.

quests.title: Void Singularity
quests.description: A void singularity is forming. Shatter it before it becomes irreversible.

quests.title: Prime Materia Dominance
quests.description: Claim complete dominance of the Prima Materia Forge. All materials are yours.

objectives.description: Collect 8 units of Prima Materia — the ultimate crafting resource.

quests.title: Before Legend
quests.description: One mission separates you from legend. Make it count.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake one final time.

quests.title: Legend of The Starforged Legion
quests.description: Level 80. The pinnacle. Defeat both the Gravity Titan AND the Abyss Harbinger in a single operation — the ultimate proof of The Starforged Legion supremacy.

objectives.description: Defeat the Gravity Titan — again, at maximum power.
Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — again, at maximum power.
Claim the Legend Seal — The Starforged Legion's highest honor.
Return to General Kaelen and be recognized as a Legend of The Starforged Legion.

quests.title: Echoes of the Void
quests.description: The void sends echoes — endless lesser threats from its defeated masters. Silence them.

quests.title: Prima Mastery
quests.description: True mastery of the Prima Materia Forge. Collect the rarest materials in existence.

objectives.description: Collect 10 units of Prima Materia — true mastery of the Forge.

quests.title: Siphon's Ghost
quests.description: The collapsed Siphon Core still emanates power. Investigate and recover its remnants.

objectives.description: Recover remnants from the collapsed Aethel Siphon Core.

quests.title: The Orbital War
quests.description: The Orbital War for total dominance. The Starforged Legion does not share the sky.

objectives.description: Claim 3 orbital war trophies from defeated enemies.

quests.title: Titan's Return
quests.description: The Gravity Titan returns. Eliminate it again.

objectives.description: Defeat the Gravity Titan — third encounter.

quests.title: Harbinger Eternal
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger — third manifestation. Destroy it permanently.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — third encounter, maximum difficulty.

quests.title: Void Convergence
quests.description: All void forces converge. The Starforged Legion must be at the center of the response.

quests.title: Shattered Legacy
quests.description: The Ashen Drake — final encounter. Claim the Legacy Shard and write history.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake — third and final encounter.
Recover the Legacy Shard from the Drake's remains.

quests.title: The Last Convergence
quests.description: Everything converges at the Severance Faultline. This is the final frontier.

objectives.description: Recover the Convergence Core from the Severance Faultline.

quests.title: Apex Eternal
quests.description: Both titans of the void — simultaneously. This is what eternal legend looks like.

objectives.description: Collect the Apex Proof — both boss cores recovered simultaneously.

quests.title: Prima Materia Sovereign
quests.description: Achieve sovereign control of the Prima Materia Forge.

objectives.description: Collect 12 units of Prima Materia — forge sovereignty.

quests.title: Orbital Colossus
quests.description: Orbital colossus units threaten The Starforged Legion's dominance. Dismantle them.

objectives.description: Destroy 2 orbital colossus units and recover their cores.

quests.title: Eternal Void
quests.description: The void is eternal — and so is the hunt. Clear it again.

quests.title: The World Engine
quests.description: The World Engine at the Aethel Siphon Core holds the final answer to Xylos's fate.

objectives.description: Uncover the World Engine's final secrets.

quests.title: Drake's Last Stand
quests.description: The Ashen Drake makes its last stand. Claim the Eternal Scale and end this forever.

objectives.description: Defeat the Ashen Drake — true final encounter.
Recover the Eternal Scale — proof of eternal mastery.

quests.title: Void Absolute
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger at its absolute final form. Destroy it completely.

objectives.description: Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — absolute final form.

quests.title: The Fracture's Heart
quests.description: Journey to the Fracture's Heart — the deepest point of the Severance Faultline and of known Xylos.

objectives.description: Recover the Fracture's Heart from the Severance Faultline's deepest point.

quests.title: Prima Ultima
quests.description: Prima Ultima — beyond even Prima Materia. The rarest substance known to exist.

objectives.description: Collect 5 units of Prima Ultima — the rarest substance in existence.

quests.title: One Step From Eternity
quests.description: Three apex entities. One operation. The final step before eternity.

quests.title: Eternity — Legend of The Starforged Legion
quests.description: Level 100. The final quest. The Gravity Titan and the Abyss Harbinger at their true eternal forms. Defeat both, recover the Eternal Crown, and return to General Kaelen. This is your legacy.

objectives.description: Enter the Void Echo Chasm at maximum depth.
Defeat the Gravity Titan — eternal form.
Defeat the Abyss Harbinger — eternal form.
Recover the Eternal Crown — The Starforged Legion's supreme relic.
Return to General Kaelen. Be recognized as the Eternal Legend of The Starforged Legion.
